name: Korean BBQ Beef
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs Beef Sirloin Tips, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and marinate for at least 2 hours.
2. Cook the beef on the grill as skewers or stir-fry it without skewers.
3. If sirloin tips are unavailable, substitute with flank steak; it tastes equally delicious.
4. For added heat, replace sesame oil with hot pepper sesame oil and include a pinch of cayenne pepper.
5. The sugar helps the beef caramelize slightly (using cane sugar works as well).
